reason: While this is a Quranic verse about fighting disbelievers, merely quoting religious text with hashtag #Quran does not indicate ISIS support. This verse is commonly shared by general Muslims.
original_post: {يا أيها النبي جاهد الكفار والمنافقين واغلظ عليهم ومأواهم جهنم وبئس المصير} [التحريم9] #قرآن
